heading: About Me
paragraphs: Hi 👋, I'm a Junior MERN Stack Developer focused on building full-stack web applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.
I come from a strong real-world background in CMS development, server management, and working with live production systems.
That experience helps me go beyond just writing code. I understand deployment, performance, and how applications behave in real environments.
